---
title: Grandparents For Vaccines
description: OPTIONAL SUBTITLE
author: Bradley J Roth, PhD
date: '2026-02-02'
draft: false
categories:
- Vaccines
- Family
image: IMAGE.png
#bibliography: refs.bib # optional
---

ARTICLE CONTENT GOES HERE

TODO: troubleshoot youtube embedding

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/shVxFcVpCT0?si=-M1c5XTKKKrqt2dH" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

{{< video https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/shVxFcVpCT0?si=-M1c5XTKKKrqt2dH >}}

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/shVxFcVpCT0?si=nuaiS5AA-pCJZsYe" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/shVxFcVpCT0?si=nuaiS5AA-pCJZsYe >}}

[Dedicated to Olivia Dahl](https://youtube.com/shorts/7EDZ1RC6Uhg?si=VZjwRYDbsH5t-Rhk)

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/7EDZ1RC6Uhg?si=VZjwRYDbsH5t-Rhk >}}

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9BT_FSJBJ-c?si=xuO90_pmlrdN5WMd" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

{{< video https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9BT_FSJBJ-c?si=xuO90_pmlrdN5WMd >}}

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/9BT_FSJBJ-c?si=NiRaDHaK-JO7EYYZ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/9BT_FSJBJ-c?si=NiRaDHaK-JO7EYYZ >}}

::: {.flex-container .align-center}
![Illustrated by <a href="https://WEBSITE">ILLUSTRATOR</a>.](IMAGE.png){width=500px}
:::

<hr>

::: {.callout-note title="About the author" style="" icon=false}
AUTHOR BIO GOES HERE
:::

::: {.flex-container .align-center}
![](./SharmaRothBlackboard.jpg){width=70%}
:::
